## Linked Issue

Closes #(issue number)

<!--
Every PR must be linked to an existing issue.
Use one of these closing keywords followed by the issue number:
  Closes #123
  Fixes #123
  Resolves #123

If no issue exists for your change, open one first.
PRs without a linked issue will fail the validation check and cannot be merged.
-->

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
